name: provenance entry validator rejects when evidence_count integer disagrees with the supporting_prs array length
command: printf '{"class":"pr-corpus","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"verbatim_quote":"x","org":"a","tier":1}],"evidence_count":5,"organizations_count":1}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-provenance.sh" --provenance prov.json --check-counts 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'evidence_count_mismatch' err.txt && grep -q 'declared=5' err.txt && grep -q 'actual=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
